basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar – Professor, Associate Professor and More – 35 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) Professor Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for 35 Professor posts. Eligible candidates can apply online from 21.05.2026 to 04.06.2026 through the official NIT Silchar website. Candidates looking for faculty jobs in Assam can check the eligibility criteria, salary details, application process, and important dates before applying online.

qualification.education_qualification: As per Schedule E of NIT Statute and MoE Notifications dated 30-11-2017, 16-04-2019 and 27-10-2020

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-14A [PB-IV with AGP INR 10,500.00 (6th CPC scale)]

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Silchar Professor Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: NIT Silchar Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 35 Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
